name: AlexSulliMora-Marketplace
description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace. Ships CASM-tools: the review cascade plus an academic-paper pipeline that uses it.

plugins.name: CASM-tools
plugins.description: Tiered creator/reviewer review cascade (/CASM-tools:review-document) with nine reviewer agents, shared preferences for scoring and style, and an academic-paper pipeline (summarize, extend, present) that uses the same cascade for its internal quality loops.
